body:
## Context
`packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` is a proven, repeatedly-shipped batch pattern (gear-evolution-over-career pages, batches 1-22 shipped; batch 22 was #3653 — Nick Augusto + Richard Christy + Kevin Talley, closed).

Verified via diff of the full 62-drummer roster against `slug:` keys currently in `drummerEvolution.js` (56 keys present): **9 drummers still have no evolution entry**: navene-koperweis, hannes-grossmann, travis-orbin, arin-ilejay, chris-turner, daray, jocke-wallgren, isaac-lamb, ryan-van-poederooyen. This batch (23) covers 3 of those 9, chosen for genre cohesion (technical/progressive metal cluster):
- **Navene Koperweis** (ex-Animals as Leaders, Scale the Summit) — technical prog-metal, high name recognition in djent community.
- **Hannes Grossmann** (Obscura, Alkaloid, ex-Necrophagist) — technical death/prog metal, one of the genre's most respected drummers.
- **Travis Orbin** (Periphery founder, session/solo) — djent scene's most technical drummer, already has a standalone article (#1448).

## Non-duplicate check
`gh issue list --state all --search "Drummer Evolution batch 23"` returns no hits; highest shipped batch is 22 (#3653). Individually grepped each of the 3 names against `drummerEvolution.js` — zero matches for any.

## Template
Follow the existing `drummerEvolution.js` entry shape (see e.g. `derek-roddy` for structure): `slug`, `name`, `band`, `totalYearsActive`, `profileImage`, `summary`, and an `eras` array (each with `id`, `era`, `years`, `startYear`/`endYear`, `description`, `albums`, `tours`, `image`, and a `gear` object with `drums`/`snare`/`cymbals`/`hardware` sub-objects each carrying `item`/`details`/`notes`/`change`).

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` — add 3 entries
- 3 corresponding `/llms/evolution/<slug>.md` files (pattern established since issue #1805)

## Quality gate
- ≥3 era entries per drummer, each with a distinct gear era and narrative (not just a spec dump)
- ≥300 words total narrative per drummer across the timeline
- Internal links to the drummer's profile and gear-history page (if present)
- FAQ per the evolution-generator pattern used by all prior batches

## Estimated organic uplift
Extends a pattern with 22 shipped batches. Closes roster coverage from 56/62 (90%) toward 59/62 (95%). Travis Orbin already has editorial attention (#1448 article) — the evolution page completes his content cluster.

## Verify
1. `grep -c "^  '" packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` (top-level drummer key count) increases by 3
2. Each new entry has ≥3 era items with distinct years/gear
3. `/llms/evolution/navene-koperweis.md`, `/llms/evolution/hannes-grossmann.md`, `/llms/evolution/travis-orbin.md` exist and are non-empty
4. No duplicate slug keys introduced
5. Cross-links from each drummer's main profile page to their new evolution page resolve (no 404s)

## Done
3 new entries added to `drummerEvolution.js` with ≥3-era timelines, LLM files generated, cross-links verified.
title: SEO batch: Drummer Evolution batch 23 — Navene Koperweis + Hannes Grossmann + Travis Orbin (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
